request_payload.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we push for strategic autonomy, they're cutting corners on defense spending and leaving us to bear the burden. Remember the last crisis? We were the ones holding the line while others hesitated. It's time to put America first—demand accountability from those who expect us to do their heavy lifting. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
